title: Modular Trading Workspace
summary: A flexible paper trading workspace with safe windows for chart review, the AI_OS Paper Trade Engine, route planning, status telemetry, and the next safe action.

handoff_path.title: Paper Signal Handoff Path
handoff_path.summary: TradingView signal idea -> AI_OS validation -> TradersPost paper route preview.

panels.title: TradingView Signal Source
panels.summary: Shows where a future chart alert idea would start, using AI_OS-owned labels and local mock data only.
panels.next_action: Review the mock signal idea inside AI_OS before any external setup.

panels.title: AI_OS Validation Layer
panels.summary: AI_OS checks latency, regime, risk gate, paper decision, scorecard, and safety locks before any route preview.
panels.next_action: Keep the paper runner validator as the source of truth.

panels.title: TradersPost Paper Route Preview
panels.summary: Shows a future paper route preview without login, webhook activation, broker connection, or order placement.
panels.next_action: Use this only as a paper-route planning view.

tradingview_chart.title: TradingView Chart Window
tradingview_chart.detail: Safe placeholder only. No login, API key, webhook, broker, account connection, or real chart integration is active.

paper_trade_engine.title: AI_OS Paper Trade Engine Window
paper_trade_engine.summary: AI_OS-owned Paper Trade Engine remains the core paper trading system.
paper_trade_engine.detail: Shows Paper Trade Signal, Paper Risk Gate, Paper Decision, Paper Trade Result, Paper Scorecard, and Next Safe Action.

traderspost_route_preview.title: TradersPost Route Preview
traderspost_route_preview.detail: No iframe assumption, login, broker, real route, webhook activation, or execution is enabled.

status_telemetry.title: Status / Telemetry Window
status_telemetry.summary: Safety and telemetry state for the paper trading workspace.
status_telemetry.detail: Live execution, broker, OANDA, credentials, real orders, and real webhooks remain blocked.

next_action.title: Next Action Window
next_action.summary: Review the Paper Risk Gate before expanding any external platform planning.
next_action.detail: Keep the workspace paper-only and use validators before future APPLY work.

external_platforms.path: Trading Lab -> Tools / Connectors -> External Trading Platforms -> MetaTrader 5 / TradingView / TradersPost

paper_trade_engine.risk_gate: Paper Risk Gate: BLOCKED by default
paper_trade_engine.decision: Paper Decision: do_not_simulate_trade until review conditions pass
paper_trade_engine.paper_trade_result: Paper Trade Result: not executed while risk is blocked
paper_trade_engine.scorecard: Paper Scorecard: neutral, no profitability claim
paper_trade_engine.next_safe_action: Review Paper Risk Gate and run DRY_RUN validators.
